hypothesis: Chord-change and harmonic-loop-return hints can improve downbeat and phrase-start detection without becoming a primary BPM detector.
changes: add DownbeatHypothesisTracker with concurrent beat 1/2/3/4 hypotheses
add HarmonicHintBranch for chroma and chord-change evidence
keep harmonic weight at zero for BPM and low weight for downbeat/phrase
rollback_condition: Rollback if BPM error worsens by more than 0.5 or if false downbeat behavior clearly increases.
